message:
Merge PR #2479: fix: EnsureMetadata repairs stale dolt_server_port

Makes EnsureMetadata overwrite stale dolt_server_port values with the
authoritative config, fixing "connection refused" errors after metadata
repair. Includes test for the stale-port scenario.

PR: https://github.com/steveyegge/gastown/pull/2479
Author: seanbearden (Sean Bearden)

Co-authored-by: Sean Bearden <seanbearden@users.noreply.github.com>
